item.title: Images of Note: twinkerbell
item.description:
THE PUB WITCH!
(pls get me out of here)
his eyes looked so gazed over I wonder what happened to him
nyoom
It's him. It's Provolone Dave
Are you going to make Big Concrete Win?
Twinkerbell
Everything is Heresy
Looks at all the people who go "RTFM" to newbies.
Kids: Starts playing with cheap stim toys. Adults: Thus begins the fall of civilization.
Where do you fall?
The UK are passing laws to basically stop any form of protest the government or police do not like.
Now I can't unhear it.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay
item.dc:creator: abbiistabbii

item.title: It's my cake day! Have some memes
item.description:
Kinda video heavy in the beginning so check your wifi and etc. You know the drill.
.
.
Cats? More like C H A O S
.
.
h o w d a r e y o u
.
.
the void requires treats
.
This was my ex
radical, dude
.
*OSHA INTENSIFIES*
.
.
.
.
That's it, fellow millennials. We're officially deceased.
.
.
Why indeed
.
.
.
.
Every time
.
Mask the pain with humor, works 99% of the time
It do be like that
More like 10
.
.
.
.
<3
shit dude
.
.
.
.
.
choo choo
.
.
2 to 6
.
.
I really am. Please know this random screeching bird woman from the internet thinks you're pretty rad. Keep going my dudes and stay awesome
item.dc:creator: SecretHarpy

item.title: Ha-ha.
item.description: Source: https://apnews.com/article/oregon-republican-walkout-reelection-f1d270db9e9a72935c13b973d79a4bb7 Alternate: https://www.oregonlive.com/politics/2024/02/republican-senators-who-walked-out-of-oregon-legislature-cant-seek-reelection-state-supreme-court-rules.html Fox puppets laying out how to steal an election before actively commanding it: https://imgur.com/gallery/sQzDOlI Pardons for criminals, by criminals: https://www.justice.gov/pardon/pardons-granted-president-donald-j-trump-2017-2021 Brought to you by: "The best people" https://imgur.com/gallery/5k3JHlE https://imgur.com/gallery/9zDDKFT (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/LPyUdYF (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/7wxyNys (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/taJZoC7 (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/VdkqbFS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/YlAGDFN (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8GHlxoG (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/8VGDY8w (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/hYduSMS (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/3uhtTUq (continued) https://imgur.com/gallery/JJzITny (continued) FULL LIST: https://www.dailykos.com/history/user/CajsaLilliehook Don't forget Gweggy! https://imgur.com/gallery/ddZqpFD More from Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/NNRExX2 Also in Texas: https://imgur.com/gallery/prqm2cq Also in Texas (update provided by: UnknownParticipant67): https://www.chron.com/neighborhood/moco/news/article/texas-right-to-life-luke-bowen-prison-solicit-teen-17788511.php That's a lot of lawsuits! https://www.azcentral.com/pages/interactives/trump-lawsuits/ Indictment 3: https://imgur.com/gallery/JQ99Kxu Follow the progress of indictment 3 against the terrorist! https://www.courtlistener.com/docket/67656604/united-states-v-trump/ Indictment 4: https://imgur.com/gallery/Kq3qYbO

item.title: Skateaway, That's All - 70 Vintage Images of Skaters!
item.description:
Playboy model Debra Jo Fondren at the Playboy Mansion skate party, California, 1979
Ice Show # 1 - I'm including some program photos from various skating shows (Ice Capades and Ice Follies here in the US) because they are spectacular! Here is Celestial Voyage, Ice Capades, 1978
Olympic boxing contender Buster Mathis in 1964
1980s toilet seat head - what is she supposed to be?
Gladys in 1910
I don't like nuns unless they have fun, hon
One of my favorite 70s exploitation films is "Switchblade Sisters" - it's sublime in every way. Icing on cake is the gang fight/shoot-out at a roller rink, check it out!
Famous Norwegian Olympic skater Sonja Henie in the 1930s
Huge roller skating scene at Venice Beach, CA, 1979
Rolling skating instructors at Savoy Ballroom, Chicago, 1941 - love the photo bombers!
1918 foursome
Circus performer with skating chimp, 1948 (photo by Stanley Kubrick)
Pillow protection from falls, 1930s
Artist Philip Garner's high heel roller skate, 1962
Jimmy the Roller Skating Horse, Ohio, 1952
Suburban moms learning to roller skate, California, 1971 (photo by Bill Owens)
Ice Show # 2 - Ice Follies, 1970
Disco skaters, 1970s
1940s
Mom and daughter, 1935
Empire Roller Disco, Brooklyn, NYC, 1980 (photo by Patrick Pagnano)
Gang of skaters, 1981
Very dapper skating boy, 1917
Restaurant drive-in with skating waiters, 1967
Elaine Asanaki (who went on to become an Olympic-level pairs figure skater) does a sit spin at Rockefeller Center, NYC, 1975 (photo by Tyrone Dukes)
Couples skate time, 1940s
Amazing spaceman/disco guy, 1978
Chevy Chase Ice Palace, Wash DC, 1942 - too bad the Zamboni wasn't invented yet
Ice Show # 3 - Ice Capades, 1984 - For Your Ice Only!
Dude, can't you read? 1980s NYC
Perched up high to watch the madness at Bay to Breakers, San Francisco, 1986 (photo by Steve Ringman)
Even Big Bird cannot resist the urge to roll
Wedding at the rink, 1944
Filming Skatetown USA (campy fun, great soundtrack) - Patrick Swayze, Scott Baio, Maureen McCormick, Ron Palillo and Greg Bradford, 1979
Salesman on his motorized roller skates refuelling at a gas station, 1961
Love these NYC skaters in 1894, famous Dakota building on back right
Roller derby girls, Detroit, MI, 1950
Ice Show # 4 - McDonald's at Ice Capades, 1974
The Netherlands, 1919
Skating to class, University of Chicago campus, 1930
Gorgeous ice and scenery in the French Alps, 1946
Nice Polaroid of two skating ladies, 1979
Judas Priest on wheels, 1981
Ice-Skating waiters, Grand Hotel les Bains, Switzerland, circa 1926
Broadway show chorus girls skate up Fifth Avenue, NYC, as they campaigned to save gas, 1942
Figure skating costumes, 1980s
Children faking street hazards for safety manuals, 1931
Saturday night in Chicago, IL, 1941 - were they listening to live organ music, a band or records? (photo by Russell Lee)
Young man on bicycle skate, 1905
Ice Show # 5 - Peluza looks fun! Ice Capades, 1978
Skating through the woods at Bois de Boulogne park in Paris, France, 1956 (photo by Jack Garafalo)
Fantastic image of a couple at the rink, and a cute photo bomber, Chicago, IL, 1941 (photo by Russell Lee)
Skate pond, Blue Earth, Minnesota, 1952
Is Chet Stickrod a great porn name or what? 1954
Skate team The Golden Rollers at Golden Gate Park, San Francisco, CA, 1982
Empire Roller Disco, Brooklyn, NYC, 1979 - Huggie Bear As Sir Lord? (photo by Bill Bernstein)
Fritz Dietl, the Skating Stilt-Man, 1930s
Look at Frank go! 1980
That's some really bad terrain for roller skating, 1940s
Kelly and Beth have four feet and one pair of skates, 1981
Ice Show # 6 - truly ugly costumes, Ice Capades, 1975
I did this plenty of times myself - Tampa, FL, 1973 (photo by Bill Yates)
The Cheap Tramp and a roller skating trick, San Francisco, 1978
Designer Philip Garner again, with a series of roller skates, 1970s - I love the swim flipper!
There are always video games to play at the rinks, Champ's Rollerdrome, Kentucky, 1981
My skating idol in the 70s - Dorothy Hamill at the 1976 Olympics. I had the haircut, the doll and I took ice skating lessons so I could be just like her.
Ice Show # 7 - the tacky outfits are incredible - Ice Capades, 1975
The Police skate at the Aragon Ballroom, Chicago, 1979
Venice Beach, CA, 1979
item.dc:creator: FAUST44

item.description: Something about "rent free"
item.dc:creator: Buzzverb75

item.title: 2024 was great until it wasn’t
item.description: Laid off last June. Crippling clinical depression for months while trying to job hunt. Submit over 100 applications for IT jobs, including a lot that were well below my skill level and prior salary. Also apply to retail jobs all around the area and a city or 2 over. Only call backs or notices I got were “we’re no longer hiring” or “we’ll keep your application on file”… but 90% of the time I would hear nothing. I had made a 6 figure salary. The stress of losing that, the stress of trying to find a job, and the depression of losing a job I loved wrecked me. It also created a lot of stress in the marriage. It didn’t help that a year earlier we had to replace our AC, furnace, and hot water heater at the same time… which set us back so much. Then the fridge went out… then I lost my job where I made 60k more than my husband. I’m still looking for an IT job, but I finally got a full time job that I started at the beginning of January at a gym chain… where I was a member since 2020, and I low key love it. I was also hired part time at the local yarn shop where I work a weekend day and 1 evening a week after I leave the gym. I LOVE working at the yarn store! It is my literal heaven! And these are great jobs that help with bringing something in financially , so I won’t feel like a burden. I’m making over $100k less a year than I had been making, which is humbling and sucks, BUT what I’m making is better than making nothing, and I’m still trying to find an IT job that fits my skills and where I won’t want to murder anything or get burnt out. Husbands tells me he’s no longer in love with me on Tuesdays and asks for a divorce. We have been in couples therapy for over a year, and divorce was never mentioned there or at home. I think he was waiting until I got a job. Yesterday I couldn’t move. Today I’m moving and starting to just write down things that need to be done.. or I’m trying to. The everything that needs to happen feels like it’s too much, and I don’t want this. I want my husband. If you made it this far, thanks. I’m going into work tomorrow, so I’m hoping that I’ll survive and I don’t ruin the makeup I’ll need to not be puffy and red nosed.
item.dc:creator: ForKnitsAndGiggles

item.title: Does a bear dump in the woods? - 079
item.description:
Febearary
The royal family must love baking, because they are really inbread.
Big if true.
Beep boop, time to poop.
Always was.
What do Socrates and my pants have in common? They're both pissed.
Mm, paste...
That's why I made the big brain decision to achieve nothing.
Correct.
It is only a true aircraft carrier if it cost the taxpayers billions of dollars.
my last two braincells be like
Hopin' for a pokin'.
Bear fact #370: There are at least 14 bears. 077 - https://imgur.com/gallery/8TZHL3C 076 - https://imgur.com/gallery/7u7vR7t 075 - https://imgur.com/gallery/0easqW9 074 - https://imgur.com/gallery/gaFapOO 073 - item.title: Oddly satisfying at work
item.description: Edit: I should clarify this isn't my actual job so I don't typically carry any type of hammer or chipping device.
